text: It's a beautiful sunny day. I went to the park. I ate some jellybeans. I sat down under an oak. A seagull landed nearby. She opened her egg. She left. I collected the egg. I took her home. I hatched her. She's a beautiful chick. I named her Liberty. I fed her worms. She liked carrots too. We're best friends. I sit here often. She watches cartoons with me. I keep pets. They're good. I should hike. Maybe find some mushrooms. Would love it. Anyway, I take my vitamins. Sleep soon. Sweet dreams.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
